title: Quest 1.7 Litre Electric Cordless Kettle/Spout Filter/Overheat & Boil Dry Protection/Student Essentials/Strix Controller / 2200W (Black)
features: KITCHEN KETTLE – Make cups of tea, coffee and more at your convenience with this compact kettle. It has a capacity of 1.7 litres, making it perfect for family homes or offices, as it can quickly boil up to 7 cups worth of water.

FAST BOIL – Featuring up to 2200W of power, the electric kettle can quickly boil multiple cups worth of water, with the transparent water level indicator helping you know exactly how much of the kettle is filled to help avoid waste. It is powered on by a switch on the handle.

SECURE & TIDY – The kettle is fitted with a spout filter, which can be removed in order to clean it. The lid features a safe locking system, boil-dry protection, and an indicator light to show when it is in use. It features an 80cm cord, which can be neatly stored within its base.

STRIX CONTROLLER – Safety is paramount with this kettle, featuring a Strix controller to reliably shut off the kettle when boiling is done. The kettle features a compact yet sturdy design, and measures 25 x 22 x 13cm.

QUEST APPLIANCES - Quest are the leading manufacturer of cooking appliances ideal for giving you a helping hand in the kitchen. From omelette makers & waffle makers to teppanyaki grills & air fryers, visit the Quest store on Amazon to view the whole range.
description: Product Description Previous page Fast Boil Featuring up to 2200W of power, the kettle can quickly boil up to 7 cups worth of water at once. Removable Filter Its spout filter can be removed at any time for cleaning, and then placed back in with a click. Indicator Light The kettle's switch features a helpful indicator light, so you always know when it is active. Simple, Versatile Design Coming in black or white colours, these modern kettles fit in with any kitchen layouts. Strix Controller The kettle's strix controller reliably shuts off the power once boiling is done, keeping it safe. Next page 1 Fast Boil 2 Removable Filter 3 Indicator Light 4 Simple, Versatile Design 5 Strix Controller
